name: Geeklab
description: Geeklab — App store optimization and A/B testing platform for experimenting with screenshots, icons, and app descriptions.

seo.title: Geeklab — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Geeklab: Geeklab — App store optimization and A/B testing platform for experimenting with screenshots, icons, and app descriptions.

when_to_use: A/B test App Store screenshots and icons at scale
Optimize app store listing before paid UA campaigns
Compare app descriptions with multivariate experiments
Store listing conversion analysis with visual variants

pros: Purpose-built ASO A/B testing for app stores
Tests icons, screenshots and copy pre-launch
Faster feedback than Apple or Google experiments
cons: Traffic is panel-based, not real store shoppers
Results need careful interpretation vs live data
Scope limited to store listing assets
review.verdict: Handy directional tool for ASO creative tests, but never a replacement for live store experiments.
review.best_for: Mobile publishers iterating on icons and screenshots before store submission
review.not_for: Teams that can already run native Apple or Google store experiments at scale
